reviews.review_description: Hello I'm young this game is really good for new players it has long arms and a lot of shiny rocks this game really brought me joy making new friends make sure to join the discord once you get the game!

Ever since I started this game I’ve been getting faster and faster and it’s thank to cosmic tag since when I got my first headset this is the first game I saw on youtube and let me just say this game has a bad and good community but I mostly see the good not the bad  and the people helped me get good so klixy thank you for everything

The best game ever I love it not one game is better than this game 
￼
But for anyone wondering yes it is cosmic taggers
